name: GetScreenshot
description: Affordable website screenshot API by Rasterwise. Simple GET request; supports synchronous (returns image binary or JSON) and async webhook delivery. From $5/mo for 2,500 screenshots. Integrates with Zapier, n8n, Make.

tools.name: get_screenshot
tools.description: Capture a screenshot of a URL. When `webhook` is provided the call returns immediately and the screenshot is POSTed to that URL as JSON on completion; otherwise returns the screenshot result synchronously.

webhook.description: Optional webhook URL; the screenshot JSON is POSTed here when ready (async mode)

device.description: Device preset to emulate (desktop, mobile, tablet, or specific devices)

element.description: CSS selector to capture only that element

delay.description: Extra delay in seconds before capturing

wait_for_selector.description: CSS selector to wait for before capturing
